notes: Fixed section had no large-scale normalization issues — 0 ID corrections were needed, indicating the LLM output for this project used consistent prefixes across all 16 batches.

The single dropped edge (createPaymentTransaction -> getInvoicePaidAmount) was caused by the batch LLM omitting the getInvoicePaidAmount function node entirely from its output, even though the function is exported from src/api/transactions.api.ts (lines 104-116). The node was not present in any batch file. Recovered by constructing the node from source inspection with sensible defaults.
Three edges were restored for the recovered node: contains and exports from file:src/api/transactions.api.ts, plus the original dropped calls edge from createPaymentTransaction.
All 350 original nodes had valid ids, valid types (file, function, pipeline, table, config, document, schema), and valid complexity values (simple/moderate/complex). No remapping was required.

The merge script already recovered 116 import edges from the importMap (198 entries scanned). Cross-batch import coverage is adequate; no additional import edges were identified as missing beyond what the merge script handled.
Final graph: 351 nodes, 871 edges with 0 dangling edge references.
